name: ninebot_login
description: Authenticate a Ninebot user to obtain an access token. Use this first before listing devices or fetching device details. Returns a token that must be passed to subsequent calls. Do not use for password reset or account registration.

username.description: Ninebot account username. Accepts email, phone number, or plain username string.

password.description: Plaintext password for the Ninebot account.

name: ninebot_list_devices
description: List all Ninebot vehicles (scooters, bikes) associated with an authenticated user. Use this after ninebot_login to get the device list. Returns only SN and name for each device; use ninebot_get_device_info for detailed status.

token.description: Access token obtained from ninebot_login. Must be a valid token string.

lang.description: Language for response text fields: zh (Simplified Chinese), zh-hant (Traditional Chinese), en (English). Defaults to zh.

name: ninebot_get_device_info
description: Get detailed status for a specific Ninebot vehicle. Use this after ninebot_login and ninebot_list_devices. Returns battery level, power status, location, estimated mileage, charging state, and GSM signal strength. Raises an error if the SN does not belong to the authenticated user.

token.description: Access token obtained from ninebot_login. Must be a valid token string.

sn.description: Device serial number (SN) obtained from ninebot_list_devices. Must be an exact match.
